actionCalls.name: GetCountriesFromGlobalValueSet
actionCalls.label: Get Countries From Global Value Set

assignments.name: SetDeliveryAddressToFilteredAddress
assignments.label: Set Delivery Address to Filtered Address

decisions.name: ConfirmOrUseDifferentOrEnterManually
decisions.label: Confirm Or Use Different Or Enter Manually

decisions.name: SendToDashboardIfSetupComplete
decisions.label: Send To Dashboard If Setup Complete

Flow.description: A flow that guides users through account registration for businesses, individual landlords, and agents, capturing names, emails, telephone numbers, and addresses.

formulas.name: AddressesAvailableText
formulas.expression: IF({!NumberOfAddressesReturned} == 1, "1 address found for " & {!EnteredPostcode}, TEXT({!NumberOfAddressesReturned}) & " addresses found for " & {!EnteredPostcode})

formulas.name: FilteredCountry
formulas.expression: CASE({!FilteredDeliveryPointAddress.COUNTRY_CODE}, "E", "England", "W", "Wales", "S", "Scotland", "N", "Northern Ireland", "L", "Channel Islands", "M", "Isle of Man", "J", "United Kingdom", "United Kingdom")

Flow.label: PRSE Account Registration

recordUpdates.name: UpdateAccountWithManualAddressInput
recordUpdates.label: Update Account With Manual Address Input

value.stringValue: Use this address,Use a different address,Enter address manually
Enter a postcode in the correct format, like PO12 6NT
Use this address,Enter address manually,Search again
Enter an agent organisation or business name
Enter an email address in the correct format, like name@example.com
You may be contacted on this number.

Agent address

If your address is outside the UK, please enter it manually.
Enter a postcode in the correct format, like PO12 6NT

Organisation or business address

If your address is outside the UK, please enter it manually.
Enter a postcode in the correct format, like PO12 6NT
Enter an organisation or business name
This is the first name of the person who manages exemptions for the organisation or business.
This is the last name of the person who manages exemptions for the organisation or business.
Enter an email address in the correct format, like name@example.com
This should be the email address of the person who manages exemptions for the organisation or business.
You may be contacted on this number.
Select organisation or business or individual
Is this account for an organisation or business, or an individual?

Select organisation or business if your property is let under a business name, or is owned by an organisation.|This usually means you pay income tax on the money you earn through letting the property.

Your home address

If your home address is outside the UK, please enter it manually.
Enter a postcode in the correct format, like PO12 6NT
Enter an email address in the correct format, like name@example.com
You may be contacted on this number.
Is this account for a landlord or an agent?
The landlord is the property owner.|You are an agent if you are registering the exemption on behalf of the property owner.
